mapper.sql: id, name, url, description, category, tags, icon, sort_order, is_active, click_count, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM yx_quick_link WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE yx_quick_link SET name = #{name}, url = #{url}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, tags = #{tags}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_quick_link SET click_count = click_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_quick_link SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
